tasks.label: Apply Patch CJS Fixed
tasks.command: mv apply_patch.js apply_patch.cjs ; node apply_patch.cjs ; npm run build

tasks.label: Cleanup unused files
tasks.command: rm -f apply_patch.cjs diff_utf8.patch diff.txt extract.txt gitlog.txt original_TaskProfilePage.jsx replacer.cjs rm-modal.cjs script_out.txt

tasks.label: Cleanup files
tasks.command: Remove-Item -Force apply_patch.cjs, diff_utf8.patch, diff.txt, extract.txt, gitlog.txt, original_TaskProfilePage.jsx, replacer.cjs, rm-modal.cjs, script_out.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
